title: What do you reckon the MBTI profile of NGEs characters are
display_title: What do you reckon the MBTI profile of NGEs characters are
wikitext: []: What do you reckon the MBTI profile of NGE's characters are?             Quote Post by notnamnam » Fri Dec 27, 2019 9:42 pm I've seen some stuff lately in regards to the Meyer Briggs profiles of the characters. (If you don't know what it is it's this personality type indicator based on the work of Carl Junge) In my opinion, Shinji is definitely an INFP (Introverted, Intuitive, Feeling, Perceptive). He's always lost in his thoughts and driven by his feelings, so I felt it was appropriate. Anyway, I can't quite place my finger on the others, so I wanted to see what you guys thought.

chunks.content:
Article: What do you reckon the MBTI profile of NGEs characters are
[]: What do you reckon the MBTI profile of NGE's characters are?             Quote Post by notnamnam » Fri Dec 27, 2019 9:42 pm I've seen some stuff lately in regards to the Meyer Briggs profiles of the characters. (If you don't know what it is it's this personality type indicator based on the work of Carl Junge) In my opinion, Shinji is definitely an INFP (Introverted, Intuitive, Feeling, Perceptive). He's always lost in his thoughts and driven by his feelings, so I felt it was appropriate. Anyway, I can't quite place my finger on the others, so I wanted to see what you guys thought.
